title: Leina-Werke Outdoor First Aid Kit — DIN 13167
short_description: Professional outdoor first aid kit compliant with DIN 13167. Waterproof bag, 42 pieces, perfect for camping and hiking.
long_description: The Leina-Werke First Aid Kit meets the DIN 13167 standard and is specifically designed for outdoor use. The waterproof nylon bag reliably protects the contents from moisture. With 42 pieces — from band-aids to dressings and a rescue blanket — you are well-prepared for common emergencies while camping and hiking.
buying_angle: Especially appealing for campers who prioritize safety and practicality: DIN 13167 certified, waterproof bag, 42 pieces.
